name: HRC_DL_VO_MAPS
description:
HRC_DL_VO_MAPS is used to record the View Objects mapped at import time so that they may be referenced at load time to ensure the appropriate VO data is located from the Data Loader stage table columns.
When data is imported for a business object, Metadata manager analyses the ADF View Object to determine the names and types of Data Loader eligible attributes used in the View Object.

columns.Name: VO_MAPPING_ID
columns.Comments: VO_MAPPING_ID

columns.Name: FLEX_AVAILABLE
columns.Comments: FLEX_AVAILABLE

columns.Name: BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID

columns.Name: VO_MAPPING_HASH
columns.Comments: VO_MAPPING_HASH

columns.Name: IS_TRANSIENT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Provides information about a VO's transient nature. The default value is set to 'N', indicating NO

columns.Name: IS_MULTIPLE_UK
columns.Comments: Indicates if the LOCAL Surrogate Key (and if a child object the PARENT Surrogate Key), has multiple User Key Lists mapped within this VO Map. The default value is set to 'N', indicating NO

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: BUS_OBJ_DATE_TYPE
columns.Comments: BUS_OBJ_DATE_TYPE

columns.Name: UK_DEO_OVERRIDE
columns.Comments: UK_DEO_OVERRIDE

columns.Name: TRANSLATION_BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Translation Business Object ID value

columns.Name: TRANSLATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Value will be "Y" for Translation Entities else will be "N".  For Existing rows value will be NULL

columns.Name: LESD_CHANGE_RESTRICTED
columns.Comments: For a Date Effective object, Y indicates that change to the Least Effective Start Date is restricted.

columns.Name: LEED_CHANGE_RESTRICTED
columns.Comments: For a Date Effective object, Y indicates that change to the Last Effective End Date is restricted.

columns.Name: ORA_SEARCH_ENABLED
columns.Comments: If OS custom property exists on TopLevel VO then Y else blank

columns.Name: RESTRICT_FLEX_FIELD_CONTEXTS
columns.Comments: If flex field contexts are restricted on TopLevel VO then Y else blank
